title: Sanji and Zeff’s Starvation Flashback
description: On pages 13–16, Sanji’s past with Zeff is revealed through their starvation on a rock, explaining the debt that binds him to the Baratie.
scene: The flashback strips away the noise of battle and focuses on hunger, sacrifice, and the dream of creating a restaurant where no one is denied food.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What Happ- Ened...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: to your leg...?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Did you...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Did you eat your own leg!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Yes.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: was the food that you gave me,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: All there was to begin with!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I have 5 days worth of food.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Yes.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: But you can't be a pirate anymore without your leg!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Yes...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Why...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Why would you do something like that!? I tried to kill you before, you know!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I don't remember doing a single favour for you! So why!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Why!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Because you and I,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Share the same dream.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: All Blue...!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: B-But even your crewmates said it didn't exist...!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It exists.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: When the right time comes, go to grand line and find it.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I may not have been able to find it in the one year I was in grand line,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: But I saw the possibility of all blue's existence.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: ...However, I've already lost all my comrades.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I can't imagine ever continuing my life as a pirate without those guys.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: They might not have believed in all blue, but they were good-hearted idiots.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: They were good friends...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: G-Geezer! Don't die!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Don't you go and die on me, you hear!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The sea... is too big... and too cruel...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I wonder how many men...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: have died designing,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The vastness of the seas...?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: In all my years as a pirate, I've gone through my fair share of times without food.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And each time,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I think how nice it'd be if there was a restaurant floating on this vast ocean.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: A restaurant...?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: That's right... If I ever manage to get off of this rock,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'll build it even if it's the last thing I do.

summary: This part gives emotional meaning to Sanji’s choices: Zeff’s sacrifice explains why feeding the hungry is sacred to him.
